name: adelphos_domain_sign_in_with_jwt_for_user
desc: Store an Adelphos / LibreChat JWT on this machine so MEPBridge can call chat.adelphos.ai/domain/*. The token is encrypted at rest with Windows DPAPI (CurrentUser scope). Obtain the JWT by signing in at chat.adelphos.ai — Settings → Account → 'Show access token'.

parameters.name: refresh_token
parameters.description: Optional refresh token for silent renewal on 401
